mano_cua.result_summary: 图案(pattern)功能正常：1) 设置基部为方格纹(checkerboard)绿黄配色 ✅；2) 切换编辑其他图层后基部图案仍正确显示 ✅；3) 返回画廊再进入编辑器，图案类型、颜色和具体样式均正确保留 ✅；4) 不同图案间切换正常 ✅；5) 全局花纹选项不会覆盖已设置的元素图案 ✅。未检测到 Bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Complete test: Pattern selection works, pattern persists when switching elements, pattern persists in gallery view, pattern persists after re-entering editor, pattern switching works correctly, global pattern settings don't override element patterns. No bugs detected in the pattern functionality.
